missingDest.name: Leave No Trace Shower for Dirty Hippies
missingDest.n: leave no trace shower for dirty hippies

missingDest.name: Ask your father anything (or tell him to fuck off)
missingDest.n: ask your father anything or tell him to fuck off

missingDest.name: The Storyteller
missingDest.location: Find them in the woods.... Some say the Thieves or those who walk the moon know the way. So asking there is a good place to start...

missingDest.name: "Everything is Political" Chai Stand
missingDest.location: We will be on the playa.. somewhere. From time to time.  You may smell the brew of our spicy delights... you may hear powerful mantras vibrating through the playa.. that would be your sign.. to come find us.

missingDest.name: Phony booths
missingDest.location: Most likely the central phone booth in nort-western part of lowlands. Then we will expan southward as far as we can. Atleast three booths in total.

missingDest.name: Vegan Waffle Wagon
missingDest.location: It's portable! Usually quite central.... A four wheeled wagon with striped red & white roof, striped black & white sides. Usually a queue of hungry hippies and good (often weird) music!

missingDest.name: Halloumi-Nati
missingDest.location: We will be moving around and not be located at our camp site . You will see out black tent moving around on the playa!

missingDest.name: Kimchii Treassure Hunt
missingDest.location: The Vegan Waffle Wagon, which will be moving around. A wagon with red/white striped ceiling, steaming waffle irons, and a red flag.

missingDest.name: Atlantis - the lost deep sea city
missingDest.location: It will move around so kepp your eyes open ;)

missingDest.name: The Wing Women Services
missingDest.location: We'll be all over the place!. We will be wearing green, brown and purple outfits. And wings of course!

destMismatches.name: Njorunns Garden
destMismatches.location: Downtown, grid square M20. Follow the signs <3

destMismatches.name: 🌿🔥 Magic Banya ✨🌫️
destMismatches.location: Sunny Hills, grid square G21. We are the sauna tent right at the Sunny Hills lake shore, our entrance is close to the pier!

destMismatches.name: The Heart
destMismatches.location: Highlands, grid square M11. We are directly at the Penta plaza in the Highlands.

destMismatches.name: Touch Divine Rituals 🌈🐲✨
destMismatches.location: Wedge, grid square R22. South-east of BL

destMismatches.name: Flowzone
destMismatches.location: Highlands, grid square M11. Highlands, Penta plaza (the big flag) next to Chilldome.

destMismatches.name: The 🐸 Sapphic Pond
destMismatches.location: Sunny Hills, grid square J21. Big lesbian flags! If you see them! That is us! 🙌

destMismatches.name: The Fire Brigade
destMismatches.location: Swamp, grid square S16. In The Swamp at Fire Plaza, a gallery and red carpet area opposite the large tent of CIRCUS the ANALOG.

destMismatches.name: Passage to Lemuria
destMismatches.location: grid square P25. The southest part of bison, look for a portal like entrance

destMismatches.name: The Room of Requirements
destMismatches.location: Eastern Slope, grid square V19. Entry from the road

destMismatches.name: DanSING

destMismatches.name: Make Your Borderland Dream Happen… Before It Actually Happens!!
destMismatches.n: make your borderland dream happen before it actually happens
destMismatches.location: Arctic chill, grid square P07. Red hearttent - ofc

destMismatches.name: Mermaid cave
destMismatches.location: Bison - North, grid square O19. Mermaid cave is at the corner of Shameless plaza, by Glittertind and Club SIN. It also hosts the Wellness of Figging and the Sea Witches Den.

destMismatches.name: Forest is for rest
destMismatches.location: grid square S06. In nature reserve, beside the road leading to Far Flung Field from Missing Piece Cottage

destMismatches.name: Period Palace
destMismatches.location: Highlands, grid square N11. Find the palace along the road connecting the Bait Al Noor plaza to the Penta Plaza, in Highlands.

destMismatches.name: Camp Body Art
destMismatches.location: Sunny Hills, grid square G20. Go to the big lake to swim. There will be a platform below camp bunny horse bar. The board will be there

destMismatches.name: Buzzcuts & Coffee @ Blackwater Operations
destMismatches.location: Swamp, grid square Q18. Look for the glorious American flag flying above The Green Zone. That's Blackwater Operations. Find Dr. Bill-Bull and sit down.

destMismatches.name: The Outdoor spa
destMismatches.location: Sunny Hills, grid square G22. The Sunny Hills, just next to the dock by the lake.

destMismatches.name: Kidsville
destMismatches.location: Lowlands, grid square P09. Find us in the tent
